examples: Glenn Libby, my fishing contact, doesn't return my calls.
It demoralised a White House team that liked and admired Mr Libby.
At the wharf I meet Justin "Buzz" Libby, who turns out to be Glenn's son.
For more on the impact of the shutdown at Prudhoe Bay, we're joined by Libby Casey.
I'm also joined by Libby Pataki, the better half of the governor of New York...
